---
pagetitle: "Feature Engineering A-Z | Instance Hardness Threshold"
image: social-cards/imbalenced-hardness-threshold.png
---

# Instance Hardness Threshold {#sec-imbalenced-hardness-threshold}

::: {style="visibility: hidden; height: 0px;"}
## Instance Hardness Threshold
:::

## Pros and Cons

### Pros

### Cons

## R Examples

## Python Examples
